headline: Lilly in advanced talks to acquire Kelonia Therapeutics for over $2 billion, WSJ says
summary: drugmaker Eli Lilly is in advanced talks to acquire biotech firm Kelonia ‌Therapeutics for more than $2 billion, the Wall ‌Street Journal reported on Sunday. A deal could be reached as soon ​as Monday and could include additional payments tied to Kelonia meeting certain milestones, the Journal added, citing people.

headline: Eli Lilly Nears Deal for Cancer Biotech
summary: Eli Lilly  is in advanced talks to acquire Kelonia Therapeutics for more than $2 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.  A deal could come as soon as Monday, assuming the talks don’t fall apart, the people said.  The deal price could also include additional consideration if Kelonia reaches certain milestones, they said.

raw.headline: Eli Lilly Nears Deal for Cancer Biotech

The deal price could also include additional consideration if Kelonia reaches certain milestones, they said.

headline: Eli Lilly (LLY) Says FDA Requests Additional Data on Obesity Pill

On April 15, 2026, Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) disclosed that the U.S. FDA had requested additional data related to potential liver injury associated with its newly approved obesity pill, along with post-marketing studies on cardiovascular risks […]
